/CAL:SENTENCE ON PRCS VIOLATION/3455REIN/CH1:CJ 103 D/CTS:103/4019HALF//WEAP/SAORD/SA2: BOHDAN FIRCOWYCZ, MICHAEL HERBST AND LAURA HERBST/SAORD2/SAORD3/X:PRCS TO EXPIRE 09-03-22,/

/CAL:STATUS OF PROGRAM/X:ATTORNEY PROVIDED SEVERAL CERTIFICATES OF PROGRAMS DEFENDANT IS NOW ATTENDING/14    GPROGRESS REPORT/PROG:11-01-19/X:COURT WANTS AN UPDATE OF WHAT DEFENDANT IS DOING WHILE IN CUSTODY/ /X:DATE OF 11-01-19 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON APD 3455PC (PRCS)/3455ADV/3455ADM/X:IT IS THE COURT'S RECOMMENDATION THAT DEFENDANT BE ALLOWED TO PARTICIPATE IN THE RSVP PROGRAM,/CONTD:TO SET SENTENCING AND STATUS OF RSVP PROGRAM ON 09-13-19/DOP/CONTD:SENTENCE ON 11-01-19/DOP/ /DISPO/X:6 MONTHS COUNTY JAIL; IF DEFENDANT PARTICIPATES IN THE RSVP PROGRAM AT A MINIMUM OF 8 MEETINGS, ONE PER WEEK, HE WILL BE SENTENCED TO CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED AND RELEASED ON 11-01-19; SENTENCE TO RUN CONSECUTIVE WITH 2516611 (2 MONTHS CJ)/X:IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLETE THE PROGRAM, HE WILL BE SENTENCED TO 6 MONTHS COUNTY JAIL WITH CTS AT SENTENCING,/
/CAL:TO SET SENTENCING & STATUS OF RSVP PROGRAM/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON APD 3455PC (PRCS)/VD:PRCS HEARING DATE OF 08-30-19/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:TS APD 3455PC (PRCS)/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON APD 3455PC (PRCS)ON 08-16-19/DOP/CONTD:APD 3455PC (PRCS) HRG ON 08-30-19/DOP/
